title: Spyro™ Reignited Trilogy

notes: I played through the first few levels with absolutely no problems at all. At first I was just impressed that the menu opened and was so smooth but now I'm playing at ~70fps without making any tweaks. So far I have not encountered any crashes or bugs except for a visual one where the game lagged a bit the first time I loaded it in but since I closed and opened it back up all animations are silk smooth and everything seems to work perfectly.
title: Spyro™ Reignited Trilogy

notes:
After finishing (100% completion) the first two homeworlds of Spyro 1 I can say that the game works perfectly, but pre-rendered cutscenes aren't being played (the game just skips them). Most of the cutscenes in the game are not pre-rendered, but intros and scenes after defeating some bosses unfortunately are, so you may want to see those on YouTube.

I tried the game with Proton-4.15-GE-1 too as it has some Windows Media patches applied but not only it doesn't help, it makes things worse (with it, pre-rendered cutscenes crash the game).

Controller support works perfectly (tested with a Steam Controller), including hotplugging. Alt-tabbing works. A minor issue I found is that when the game is open on another workspace, it still reacts to mouse movement (not clicks though).

Tested with Ultra settings and I had overall very good performance, but if you want constant 60 FPS or more, you may have to lower them a bit, just as I had to with my 1050 Ti Mobile.
title: Spyro™ Reignited Trilogy

notes: The game runs more than perfectly out of the box with one issue: cutscenes. The cutscenes are prerendered so just videos somewhere in the game files. After following these instructions from the GitHub issue (or Waistless/mf-install!!!) the game works perfectly for me and cutscenes play. https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/3035#issuecomment-531205425 https://pastebin.com/cdkRqybW
title: Spyro™ Reignited Trilogy

notes: Cutscenes do run if you use this workaround https://github.com/Nonecaster/mf-install (first cutscene of the first game doesn't run here, don't know if that's just on my machine though). The link might get taken down because of copyright/patent issues.
title: Spyro™ Reignited Trilogy

notes: Works perfectly after applying the cutscene fix: https://github.com/Waistless/mf-install
title: Spyro™ Reignited Trilogy

notes:
To get the cutscenes working - 1: Install and run the game once to create the prefix, quit game. 2: Download the "mf-install-master.zip" package from https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install and unpack the zip. 3: From a terminal, cd to the unpacked mf-install-master directory (example - cd /home/USER/Downloads/mf-install-master/) 4: Run this command in the terminal  WINEPREFIX="/home/USER/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/996580/pfx" ./install-mf.sh 5: Wait for the script to run and you're done. Now the cutscenes should be working.

NOTE: You should change the directories in the above commands accordingly based on your system. My examples are using the default directories on my install (replace USER with your own username).
title: Spyro™ Reignited Trilogy

notes: After applying the media foundation workaround for Wine ( https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install ) game worked as expected with 120 average FPS at 1440p. As others have reported, initial level loads encounter FPS hitching until level is fully loaded after which game runs smoothly.
title: Spyro™ Reignited Trilogy

notes:
Prerendered cutscenes don't work oob. mf-install fixes this. =====

Sometimes after leaving animated cutscenes the camera will not be allowed to rotate past a certain point. Going to the pause menu fixes this. =====

Severe hitching when first entering a level, while assets load. =====

When starting a new game Spyro 1, the flame does not work. Quit to title and re-enter game to fix. =====

In Spyro 2, flame and jump do not work when bound to mouse1 and space bar. Workaround is to use xmodmap to change the keysyms of the mouse1 and space bar to something else, and rebind keys in game to those new values. I mapped space bar to "return", and swapped mouse1 and mouse8.
title: Spyro™ Reignited Trilogy

notes:
Needed to install mf foundation patch to get cutscenes working but after that was able to play Spyro 1 to 120% completion without issue. 

Sadly cutscenes in Spyro 2 are broken even with the MF foundation patch and I have had to return to windows. 

Performance was fine  on par with windows and I didn't notice any glitches in actual game-play sadly cut-scenes are a deal breaker for me.
